skill.name: code-review-simplicity
skill.description: Simplicity-focused review lens for identifying unnecessary complexity, dead logic, unclear naming, duplicated behavior, and maintainability drag during code review.
skill.author: Agent Skills Team

name: code-review-simplicity
description: Simplicity review lens for readability, cognitive load, unnecessary abstraction, duplication, and dead-range logic.

categories.name: Readability & Clarity
categories.description: Naming, magic values, nesting, boolean complexity, and long functions

categories.name: Cognitive Load
categories.description: Parameter count, responsibility load, inheritance depth, and mental model cost

categories.name: Unnecessary Complexity
categories.description: Over-engineering, premature abstraction, and patterns without value

categories.name: Colliding or Redundant Bounds
categories.description: Bound-range collapse, dead-range logic, and constant-output paths

categories.name: Code Duplication
categories.description: Copy-paste logic and repeated structures that should converge

categories.name: Testing & Debugging Simplicity
categories.description: Hidden side effects, difficult debugging, and hard-to-test design
